caption: A woman with blonde hair tied back, wearing a white short-sleeved t-shirt and matching white trousers, stands in a medical or dental office setting. She has a small blue name tag on her left chest. Behind her are white cabinets, a computer monitor, a sink with red containers, and a black examination chair. A purple informational poster and a dark rectangular framed picture are mounted on the light-colored wall. Throughout the sequence, the woman faces the camera and speaks, gesturing with her hands held in front of her waist. In the final segment, she lowers her gaze and looks down toward her hands. The scene remains static in terms of location and objects, focusing entirely on the woman's upper body movements and facial expressions as she delivers a message.
